package service

import (
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Anti-pattern: Service configures GORM session options (PrepareStmt, DryRun,
// SkipHooks) directly instead of delegating to a repository method that
// encapsulates session configuration.

type User struct {
	ID   uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name string `gorm:"column:name"`
}

type UserService struct {
	db *gorm.DB
}

func (s *UserService) CreateUserWithPreparedStmt(user *User) error {
	session := s.db.Session(&gorm.Session{
		PrepareStmt: true,
		NewDB:       false,
	})
	return session.Create(user).Error
}

func (s *UserService) ValidateUserDryRun(user *User) error {
	session := s.db.Session(&gorm.Session{
		DryRun: true,
	})
	return session.Create(user).Error
}

func (s *UserService) UpdateUserSkipHooks(user *User) error {
	session := s.db.Session(&gorm.Session{
		SkipHooks: true,
	})
	return session.Save(user).Error
}
